title: quercus mohriana
intro: Quercus mohriana, also known as the Island Live Oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Hawaiian Islands. The medicinal properties of Quercus mohriana lie in its leaves, which contain tannins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, providing anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus mohriana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Quercus mohriana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
